● A 2D pattern code feature has been added for friend requests.
● Revisions have been made to some features.

title: Project Entropy
notes: - Other gaming experience and display optimizations.

title: Clash Royale
notes:
New update: More Ways to Play!
• NEW EVOLUTION: Princess, shoots frost arrows that slow enemies down
• NEW HERO: Tombstone, unleashes Tomb Queen
• NEW GAME MODE: Princess Gambit – no King Tower, no deck draft
• NEW Collection Level, replacing King’s Journey
• COMING IN JULY: New Card + C.H.A.O.S 2.0
• Plus bug fixes and improvements

title: Skyblade: Idle Immortal-APAC
notes:
1. From June 18 to July 8, the Taorium Festival series of events will be open. Details are as follows:
Legacy Codex: Get rich rewards like Immortal Jades and Starcharts from the Legacy Codex. Unlocking advanced rewards also grants Voucher rebates and specific Earth Tier Citta Choice Boxes.
Prediction Conclave: During the Taorium Festival, participate in predictions of certain gameplays to enjoy a 50% increase in rewards upon success. Discounted items will also be added to the Celestial Conclave

title: Puzzles & Chaos: Frozen Castle
notes: Several game content updates and bug fixes.

title: Candy Crush Soda Saga
notes:
Sodalicious! We update our game every week with exciting levels, improvements to the game, and fun new features. Download the latest version to check it out!
Joining us after a break? Welcome back! New to the game? You’ll be a pro before you know it!
